description: Enable and configure the 'Email to a Friend' feature and 'Wishlist Sharing' options to encourage sharing while preventing spam. For 'Email to a Friend', enable the feature, set 'Allow for Guests' to No, 'Max Recipients' to 3, and 'Max Products Sent in 1 Hour' to 5. For 'Wishlist Sharing', set 'Max Emails Allowed to be Sent' to 5 and change the 'Email Sender' to 'Customer Support'. Save the configuration. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
